## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Filenames use `kebab-case` (see `AGENTS.md` for exceptions)
- [ ] New files are in the right layer — addon code is in `addons/`, not `apps/`
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the changed behaviour
- [ ] No new comments that explain *what* the code does (only *why*)
- [ ] No `pull_request_target` added to any workflow; new actions are SHA-pinned
